t_ch: 我要你收回刚才的发言，你这是在歧视皮皮西！
t_en: You take back your words! You're just belittling the Pepeshi!

t_ch: 基于这次比赛，我觉得有必要重新考虑我们之间的合作关系。
t_en: With what has transpired in this competition, I think we need to reconsider our partnership.

t_ch: 盛会海选刚刚结束，作为观众，您印象最深的是哪场比赛？
t_en: The Festivity Auditions have just ended. As part of the audience, which round gave you the most profound impression?

t_ch: 当然是决赛——我没有内场票所以看的直播，但全程还是激动地直抖腿。
t_en: The finals, of course. I had to watch the livestream because I couldn't get tickets, but even then, the entire round got me gripping the edge of my seat.

t_ch: 特别是最后，科诺达和里昂互相飙戏，里昂在被长剑刺中后倒地而死，我打算回去把这段的录播再看个七次八次的。
t_en: Especially that last part where Kenoda and Leon had an acting showdown — the scene where Leon fell to the ground and died after being stabbed by the longsword... I intend to rewatch that recording at least a dozen times.

t_ch: 额…您是不是按错了什么，把海选切成往届的录播了？
t_en: Err... Did you hit something wrong and switch the auditions to a recording of the previous season?
Huh?

t_ch: 怎么会有这么不讲理的事情！
t_en: How could such an unreasonable thing happen!

t_ch: 你说那骑士，怎么看都是冠军的料。我把宝全押在他身上，马上都能去领钱了，结果半路冲出来两个人，给我说他输了，这谁能忍？
t_en: That knight has the makings of a winner any way you slice it. I had all my money on him, and was just about to claim my winnings. But then this pair suddenly showed up out of nowhere and told me he lost — who could stomach that outcome?
Treat it as paying for a hard lesson learned.

t_ch: 这教训也太贵了——苏乐达能不能当主食？我未来半年只能吃这个了。
t_en: That lesson cost me an arm and a leg. Can SoulGlad pass as a meal? Because it's all I can afford for the next six months.

t_ch: 这…你不会把工资都全搭进去了吧？
t_en: Err... You didn't bet your entire pay, did you?

t_ch: 以上，就是本次盛会海选的全部内容——下面，有请本台的特别评论员，「低热量」老师为大家带来深入分析。
t_en: And that was all that happened in this Festivity Audition. Next up, we welcome the special judge of our TV station, Professor "Low Calorie," to give us a thorough analysis.

t_ch: 由于临近谐乐大典，无论是从规模、关注度还是参赛者的平均水准，本届海选都与往年有显著差异。
t_en: Since it's held so close to the Charmony Festival, the auditions this time have been a stark contrast to those held in past years whether in scale, reception, or contestant caliber.

t_ch: 此外，嗅到商机的苏乐达将赞助额提到了历年来的最高点。随之而来的，是住宿、餐饮、奢侈品等多个领域的营收抬升。
t_en: Also, SoulGlad — having sniffed out a business opportunity — has increased their sponsorship budget to the highest it's been historically. Subsequently, the revenues from accommodation, food and drinks, luxury goods, and other industries have also followed suit.

t_ch: 海选不仅是娱乐的盛会，也是商业的盛会。
t_en: The auditions aren't just a festival for entertainment. It is also for business.

t_ch: 期待了这么久的演出，说取消就取消了。
t_en: Such a long-anticipated performance, canceled just like that.

t_ch: 亏我还高价请人抢的票，预支了两个月的假期，这下钱和假都打水漂了。
t_en: And to think I even asked people to nab tickets at such insane prices and overdrafted a two-month vacation in advance. Guess my money and vacation days are gone with the wind now.

t_ch: 据我同事听来的猎犬内部爆料，这很可能是一场有预谋的政变，就是几大家主为了对付橡木家系搞出来的。
t_en: According to insider gossip I heard from my coworker about the Hounds, this could be a premeditated coup by the major family heads against the Oak Family.
That's far-fetched, even from you.

t_ch: 不然你说是为什么？突然整这么一出，背后绝对有什么惊天大阴谋！
t_en: Why else do you think then? For this to suddenly happen, there must be some earthshaking conspiracy behind it!

t_ch: 星期日怎么可能是叛徒？绝对是哪里弄错了。
t_en: How could Sunday be a traitor? This must be some mistake.

t_ch: 神主一定会证明他的清白的！
t_en: The Great One will surely prove his innocence!

t_ch: 要我说，这才是他的本来面目，还有那个大搞独裁的梦主，多半也不是什么好东西。
t_en: If I may say so, these are his true colors. And that dictator of a Dreammaster is probably no better himself.

t_ch: 万一是被诬陷的呢？我看公司来了不少人，说不定就是他们联合真正的叛徒干的。
t_en: What if he was framed? I noticed many IPC staff around. Maybe they're in cahoots with the real traitor.

t_ch: 快让我离开，耽误了后续的演出，你担得起责任吗？
t_en: Let me leave right now. You think you can shoulder the responsibility of me missing the upcoming performance?

t_ch: 上头有紧急命令，调查结束前，任何人都不得进出。
t_en: The higher-ups have emergency orders that no one is allowed to enter or exit the premises before investigations are concluded.

t_ch: 别说是你，就算来的是知更鸟小姐和梅芙恩女士，我们也照拦不误。
t_en: Even if Miss Robin or Lady Maeven were here, we'd still intercept them, much less you.

t_ch: 我第一次见猎犬弄这么大阵仗，还是对付家族自己，弄得我都疑神疑鬼的。
t_en: This is the first time I've seen the Hounds come out in such force, and against The Family too. This is making me all paranoid.

t_ch: 我们鸢尾花里，会不会也有叛徒？
t_en: Do you think there are also traitors in our Iris Family?
Who knows?

t_ch: 我最担心的是，有人指证我们也是叛徒，但我们又没有证据自证清白。
t_en: What I'm most worried about is that someone accuses us of betrayal as well — we have nothing to prove our innocence.

t_ch: 看到那些审查官了吗？直接越过议会把我们全扣在这里，匹诺康尼怕是要变天了。
t_en: You see those investigators? They bypassed the council and just detained us outright — something huge is going down in Penacony.

t_ch: 橡木家系那群冥顽不灵的东西，我巴不得他们从天上掉下来。
t_en: Those pigheaded Oak Family members, I pray they fall out of the sky.

t_ch: 现在是开放宇宙市场的时代，为了家族的未来和神主的荣耀，是时候让咱们苜蓿草站到台前了。
t_en: This is an age of open cosmic markets. For The Family's future and the Great One's glory, it is time for the Alfalfa Family to take the helm.

t_ch: 你真不知道发生了什么？明明那位家主在剧院弄出这么大动静？
t_en: Do you really not know what's happening? Even after that family head obviously made such a ruckus at the theater?

t_ch: 我…只感觉做了一个好长的梦，但梦里的东西都想不起来了。
t_en: I... feel like I just had a really long dream, but I can't remember anything in it.

t_ch: 你好好想想，自己都看到了什么？除了星期日，还有哪些叛徒？
t_en: Think carefully, what did you see? Who else were the traitors, besides Sunday?

t_ch: 大家都是家族的一员，只要坦白出来，我们不会为难你的。
t_en: Everyone is part of The Family. As long as you are truthful, we will not make this difficult for you.

t_ch: 星期日…叛徒？我什么都不知道啊……
t_en: Sunday... A traitor? I don't know anything about this...
This one's a bit worn out...
Better find someone to fix it.
Isn't it a bit uneven...

t_ch: 比赛都结束了谁关心这个？
t_en: Who cares? The competition's over.
Did you place a bid on this competition?

t_ch: 再输下去，裤子都要赔光了。
t_en: If I keep losing, I'm gonna lose my pants too.

t_ch: 很久以前，热砂的时刻是一片危险的荒漠……
t_en: Long ago, the Moment of Scorchsand was a dangerous desert...

t_ch: 真的吗？太令人难以置信了！
t_en: Really? That's wild!
Not this time either...

t_ch: 这次的盛会巨星肯定是她！
t_en: I bet she'll be the superstar of this contest!

t_ch: 不可能，我看中的偶像比她强多了！
t_en: Impossible. My idol's much better than her!

t_ch: 各位观众，这里是热砂的时刻，让我为您带来达乐苏盛会海选的现场报道…
t_en: Dear viewers, this is the Moment of Scorchsand. Let me bring you the official on-site details from the SoulGlad Festivity Auditions...
Ah. Sorry. Mispronounced that one. SoulGlad!
Welcome to Scorchsand Hall!
The most anticipated pair of this festival's auditions...

t_ch: 被誉为黄金风暴的兄妹。
t_en: Known as the Siblings of the Golden Storm.
Brother, I think we should change the name.
What, I think this moniker's pretty cool, no?

t_ch: 现在，我们就在海选大厅的现场。
t_en: Now, we're live in the audition lobby.

t_ch: 选手们摩拳擦掌，火花一触即发…
t_en: The contestants are raring to go, and sparks are about to fly...
Your prediction for this round...

t_ch: 老牌代表队的发挥都很稳定。
t_en: The veteran teams' performance has been steady so far.

t_ch: 但独立参赛者的上限会更高。
t_en: But the independent contestants possess a far higher performance ceiling.
The artists under our banner...

t_ch: 每天九个系统时的练习…
t_en: They're training for nine system hours every day...
So the champion's a shoo-in?
Friends first, competitors second.
The main thing is the effort put in.

t_ch: 本次海选采用全新赛制。
t_en: The auditions this time have new regulations and rules.

t_ch: 会场设备也进行了全面升级。
t_en: The venue's facilities have also been overhauled.

t_ch: 为选手带来不一样的体验…
t_en: To bring the contestants an experience never seen before...

t_ch: 作为著名的青年企业家…
t_en: As a renowned young entrepreneur...
What's the goal of your participation in the auditions this time?
To be the Festive Superstar, of course.

t_ch: 超越历史上的所有选手…
t_en: To surpass all the contenders from before...
Did you register by yourself?
What would you like to say to your opponents?
To be joining the auditions for the first time, you...
Can you ask one question at a time...

t_ch: 或许这就是命中注定吧，我本想去游泳……
t_en: Perhaps this is pre-destined. I originally wanted to go for a swim...

t_ch: 结果甲板上都是水，我当时就是在这儿摔了一跤，特别惨…还是头朝地的那种……
t_en: But the deck was drenched, and this was where I slipped and fell. It was a really bad fall... The landing-on-my-head kind...

t_ch: 嗯嗯，当时我正在这儿看风景，顺手就拉了你一把。
t_en: Yes, I was here admiring the scenery then, and helped you up.

t_ch: …可是这甲板是防水速干的材质吧，怎么会滑倒呢？
t_en: ...But this deck is made from wetproof and instant-dry material. How did you slip?

t_ch: 我听人说那泳池里有什么东西，总之…挺危险的。
t_en: I heard someone saying there was something in the pool. Anyway, it was... pretty dangerous.

t_ch: 我也听说了，还好咱们最近都没下过泳池……
t_en: I heard about that too. Good thing we haven't been in the pool lately...

t_ch: 当时我不是正好摔跤了嘛，感觉头很疼就取消了游泳计划。
t_en: I had a splitting headache after slipping, so I canceled any plans to swim.

t_ch: 现在想想我真是幸运，或许这就是命吧，有时候啊，你不得不信这玩意儿……
t_en: I lucked out, come to think of it. That's life, I suppose. Sometimes, it's hard not to believe in such things...

t_ch: 吃饱了就睡的感觉真好……
t_en: Nothing better than sleeping on a full tummy...

t_ch: 我在家的时候老是失眠，来这儿之后好了很多…一沾枕头就困……
t_en: I had a hard time sleeping when I was at home. My condition has improved since I came here... I get drowsy as soon as my head hits the pillow...

t_ch: 那个什么典礼我也不想去了，我想再眯一会儿……
t_en: I don't feel like going to that whatsit ceremony. Lemme nap a little longer...
*snore* *snore*...

t_ch: 累死了，说什么紧急疏散，跑了一大圈……
t_en: Gosh, I'm tired out. What's this nonsense about an emergency evacuation? They made us run in a circle...

t_ch: 哎，咱俩的房间好像触发什么装置了，床垫都湿透了，现在还没收拾好…搞什么……
t_en: Hey, our room seems to have triggered some device. The bed's sopping wet, and they haven't finished cleaning it yet... What's going on...

t_ch: 嘘，别吵别吵。他们不是在整理了嘛，安静点，让我再睡会儿……
t_en: Shh, stop kicking up a fuss. They're tidying it up now, aren't they? Pipe down and let me sleep a little longer...

t_ch: 那可不行，长远的事谁能说得准呢？这个价格有些虚高了。
t_en: That won't do. Who knows what'll happen in the future? This price is a little inflated.

t_ch: 可是我这个…这个…数据是…是有验证过，公司背书的事…你这开价也太低了吧。
t_en: But my... my data has... has been validated. With the IPC's endorsement... Your offered price is too low.

t_ch: 我觉得吧，做生意呢讲究和气生财。我看大家不如一人退一步……
t_en: I think making money amicably is the essence of doing business. How about we all compromise...

t_ch: 这小哥是个实诚人，之前那么大的响动居然还不嫌弃我，给我搭了把手。
t_en: This lad is an upright one. He didn't loathe me even after such a huge commotion and even gave me a hand.

t_ch: 现在咱们就不是谈生意了，朋友与生意，我向来分得很清。
t_en: We aren't talking business anymore. I've always been clear between friends and business.

t_ch: 嗯嗯，谢谢你的理解，我看你这个报价挺实在的，我们现在签合同？
t_en: Yes, thank you for understanding. Your offered price is quite solid. Shall we sign the contract now?

t_ch: 恭喜两位啊，我订好了餐厅，我们可以边吃边聊。
t_en: Congratulations to both of you. I've booked a restaurant, and we can chat while we eat.

t_ch: 你们先去，我回下房间，一会儿我就把合同送过来。
t_en: You all head out first. I'm going back to my room, and I'll see you there with the contract.

t_ch: 你有没有这种感觉，就是周围的一切都很不真实……
t_en: Do you have this feeling that everything around us doesn't feel quite real...

t_ch: 就好像…之前一直活在梦里一样？
t_en: Like... you've been living in a dream all this time?

t_ch: 没有。不过，我刚刚做了个噩梦，在梦里，一种突如其来的绝望包裹了我…给我吓醒了。
t_en: No. But I did just have a nightmare where I was seized by an abrupt feeling of despair... It woke me up in a sweat.

t_ch: 我在匹诺康尼也算是有点人脉，我最近听说…这晖长石号要改名了？
t_en: I've got some connections on Penacony, and I heard... the Radiant Feldspar is going to have its name changed?

t_ch: 好像还不止，听闻是要易主了，这……
t_en: Not just that, I think. I hear its ownership is also going to change. This...

t_ch: …好像是有这么些风声。但你觉不觉得好突然，有点不真实了。
t_en: ...Yes, there are indeed rumors about it, but don't you think it's too sudden? Like, it's not very real.

t_ch: 等等，我该不会还在做梦吧……
t_en: Hold on. I can't still be dreaming, can I...

t_ch: 奇怪，我听那些侍者的口吻，这船怎么就易主了？变更船长这么大的事我怎么不知道？
t_en: Strange. Judging from how the servers are talking, how come the ship changed hands? How could I not have known about such a huge matter?

t_ch: 噢噢，这事啊，我听说了，家族那边的人说，好像家族里哪个大人物将船送给一位无名客了。
t_en: Oh, that. I heard about it. Someone from The Family said that some bigwig from The Family is gifting the ship to a Nameless.

t_ch: 无名客啊，我还以为是什么大富豪呢。
t_en: A Nameless eh? I thought it was gonna be some wealthy magnate.

t_ch: 嘘，闭嘴！在人家的地盘说这个，真的是…还有，无名客怎么了，伴随着开拓的就是无限商机…你懂什么！
t_en: Shhh, shut it! Saying this on their turf? Sheesh... Also, so what if it's a Nameless? Unlimited business opportunities always accompany Trailblazing ... You know nothing!

t_ch: 我听说…公司来了不少大人物，什么部门的高层好像都到齐了？
t_en: I hear... plenty of major players from IPC have come here. Something about a department's higher management all showing up here?

t_ch: 没有吧，只是来了一部分。
t_en: I doubt it. Only some of them came.

t_ch: 来了也正常，毕竟匹诺康尼的名头这么响，大把人甩着信用点想入场分一杯羹呢。
t_en: That's normal anyway. I mean, Penacony's pretty famous. Plenty of folks heavy on credits want a piece of the action here.

t_ch: 晖长石号以后就不是晖长石号了。
t_en: The Radiant Feldspar won't be called the Radiant Feldspar in the future.
Its master's changed. That's normal.

t_ch: 听说船长是个无名客，别的我一无所知。所以…对于这件事，你那边有什么内幕消息可以分享下吗？
t_en: I hear the captain's a Nameless, and I don't know much else besides that. So... you got any insider info to share on your end about this?

t_ch: 我只能说，投资的目光不妨放长远些——
t_en: All I can say is that you should cast your opportunistic eye on the long term...

t_ch: 看看公司怎么对待那个无名客呗，我们跟着做就好啦。跟着公司的步调走，总能捡口汤喝。
t_en: Let's see how IPC treats that Nameless, and we'll just follow suit. I'm sure there'll be scraps left for us if we just follow the IPC's trail.

t_ch: 不知道家族在搞什么，这谐乐大典竟然延期了……
t_en: What is The Family doing? They actually delayed the Charmony Festival...

t_ch: 我这整套日程都被打乱了。
t_en: My entire itinerary has been ruined.

t_ch: 你这损失不算什么，我才是真的惨。
t_en: You think yours is ruined? I don't even know where to begin for mine.

t_ch: 我可是预好了造型师，全套礼服、妆造大清早就准备好了，结果……
t_en: I booked a stylist, an entire set of formal wear, and had my get-up all prepped and ready in the early morning. And now...

t_ch: 那天的骚乱你也在场吧？我觉得这事没这么简单，感觉里面还有很多故事……
t_en: Were you there during the disturbance the other day? I doubt this matter's as simple as it looks. I bet there are plenty of stories buried in there...

t_ch: 没办法，这多半是公司和家族的机密，估计我们也听不到了……
t_en: Not like there's much you can do. It's most likely a secret between the IPC and The Family. I doubt we'll even get to hear about them...

t_ch: 算了，别打听这些了。反正巡航结束我们都得回去了。
t_en: Forget it. I'm not asking anymore. We have to return once the cruise ends anyway.

t_ch: 你们从哪儿招的人，这小伙子弹得挺好的。
t_en: Where'd you get this guy? This youngster's a pretty good musician.

t_ch: 曲子…我听不出来，应该是原创作品吧，挺有才的。
t_en: This melody... I can't tell what it is. It must be an original piece. Quite the prodigy.

t_ch: 呃，他是我们的临时工。原本是负责这片区域的保洁人员……
t_en: Um, he's our temp staff. He used to be the cleaner for this area...

t_ch: 太可惜了，我观察他好几天了，以他的资质，本该有更好的发展。
t_en: That's a shame. I've been observing him for a few days. With his capacities, he can do much better in terms of a job.

t_ch: 在你们这里待着实在可惜，要不…让他跟我签约吧。
t_en: He's wasting his potential by staying here with you lot. Why not... let him sign with me?

t_ch: 我很抱歉，您的好意我们心领了。但他只想留在船上，谁也劝不动。
t_en: I'm sorry. We appreciate your concern. It's just that he only wishes to stay on the ship. No one can convince him otherwise.

t_ch: 我可以带他回去找几个专业团队……
t_en: I can take him back and look for a few professional teams for him...

t_ch: 哎，您有所不知。之前不是紧急疏散嘛，他说他对{TEXTJOIN#87}有感情，就一直坐在这儿弹琴，大家拉都拉不动，还好没出事……
t_en: *sigh* You don't even know. Previously, we had an emergency evacuation, but he said he's developed such an attachment to the {TEXTJOIN#87}, that he just sat there and played the piano. No one could pull him away, but luckily nothing bad happened...

t_ch: 让我再检查一遍，可不能有任何闪失……
t_en: Let me double-check. Can't let anything go wrong...

t_ch: 这些行李箱要是出了什么问题，把我亲兄弟卖了都赔不起……
t_en: If anything goes wrong with these suitcases, I wouldn't be able to pay for the aftermath even if I sold my brothers...

t_ch: …看吧，我就说大哥这次肯定会亲自过来。
t_en: ...See, I told you Big Bro is gonna come down personally.

t_ch: 他过来干嘛？看我笑话吗…总、总之他来了也没用，反正我不回去……
t_en: What's he here for? To get a laugh outta me? A—Anyway, it doesn't matter if he's here. I'm not going back...

t_ch: 说起来…你那些「都市传说」是不是也还没调查完？
t_en: Speaking of which... Have you finished with your detective work on those "urban legends"?
...Spit it out. What wonky ideas do you have this time?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，就知道你和我是一伙的！
t_en: Hee-hee, I knew you were with me!

t_ch: 乖，我们别玩了，等爸爸回来吧。
t_en: Be good. Let's not play anymore and wait for Daddy to come back.
Nooo, I still wanna play!

t_ch: 好吧，那就再玩一会儿。等爸爸谈完生意回来就要乖乖回房间哦。
t_en: Fine, you can play for a while more. But when Daddy comes back from his business talks, you have to go back to your room, okay?
Yeah!

t_ch: 乖，我们别玩了，等爸爸回来吧。
t_en: Be good. Let's not play anymore and wait for Daddy to come back.
Nooo, I still wanna play!
Be a good kid and listen to me...
No! You're so stingy!
Children, we are...
We are bankrupt!
Our dream... it's time to awaken...

t_ch: 咦，你们不是说会有个展会吗？展品呢？展品还没送到吗？
t_en: Huh, didn't you say there would be an exhibition? Where are the exhibits? Have they not been delivered yet?

t_ch: 呃，是有这么回事，但改期了……
t_en: Um, they were supposed to be, but there's been a change in dates...
...It's empty. The exhibits...

t_ch: 很抱歉，最近的人手都在筹备谐乐大典，展品的运输时间还没确定……
t_en: I'm sorry. All our staff have been busy preparing for the Charmony Festival. We haven't been able to finalize the shipping details for the exhibits...

t_ch: 哎，我知道这事儿，确实影响蛮大的。算了算了，珍品多等等也是应该的……
t_en: *sigh* I know about this. It's actually quite a big deal. Forget it. Forget it. Treasures are worth the wait...

t_ch: 那我就在等着吧，唯有等待……
t_en: Then I shall keep waiting — I can only wait...

t_ch: 我一进去就看到一只虫子的黑影刷一下躲进了床底！
t_en: Right when I entered, I saw the shadow of a bug flash past and hide under the bed!

t_ch: 唉，我吓得心脏病快出来了……
t_en: Ah, my heart almost jumped out of my mouth...

t_ch: 忆域里没有实体，怎么会有虫子呢！
t_en: The Memory Zone has no physical entities. How can there be bugs?

t_ch: 有什么不可能的！我上次还听说有人在垃圾桶旁边看到怪物呢……
t_en: Anything is possible! I've even heard someone say that they saw a monster beside the trash can...

t_ch: 不…不好意思，我马上上报领导！
t_en: I... I apologize. I will report this to my superior immediately!
Can I get another glass of the special drink?
Just one moment.

t_ch: 那般繁荣的景象，我也曾在匹诺康尼之外的地方见过……
t_en: Such a bustling sight. I once saw a similar sight at a place outside Penacony...

t_ch: 这如黄金般的岁月啊…它们如同泡沫一般消逝……
t_en: Ah, these golden moments... They vanish as swiftly as bubbles popping in the air.
What was your dream again?

t_ch: 那时候我们都雄心勃勃，但还是屈服于世俗了。
t_en: Back then, we were both ambitious. But now, we've succumbed to the material world.

t_ch: 你还是成了大诗人，我的梦想…早就忘了……
t_en: You still made it as a coveted poet, whereas my dream... has long since been forgotten...

t_ch: 领导发话了，说这次来的都是公司那边的贵宾，所以我们的日常工作一定要……
t_en: The boss said that all arrivals are VIP guests of the IPC. So, in our daily routine, we've got to...
"Pay extra attention!"

t_ch: 呃，记性不错。总之呢，客房工作无小事……
t_en: Err, not bad, you remembered. In any case, no work in the hotel is too trivial...

t_ch: …明白明白，我会仔细检查的，请您放心。
t_en: ...I got it. I got it. I'll check more carefully. Don't you worry.

t_ch: 你能不能现实点，整天听信那种十八手消息，什么「典当行」能典当青春…别做梦了！
t_en: Can you please be more realistic? Listening to all this word-of-mouth news, stuff about how you can pawn your youth at the Pawnshop... Stop dreaming!

t_ch: 不是，这次是我自己打听到的，听说是「慈玉女士」亲自坐镇，我绝不可能被骗！
t_en: No, no. I asked about this all on my own this time. I hear Lady Bonajade is personally assuming command! I couldn't have been lied to!

t_ch: 这是一个千载难逢的机会，你不懂…总之…我一定不会错过的！
t_en: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. You wouldn't know it if it hit you in the face... Anyway... I can't miss out!

t_ch: 你这人总是这样，做事总想找捷径…算了，我们不是一路人，你以后也别来找我。
t_en: You're always trying to find shortcuts in whatever you do... Forget it. Since we're not like-minded anyway, we should just stop associating with each other.

t_ch: 咳咳，很抱歉打断二位的对话。餐厅包房已布置完毕，二位有事相谈，何不暂缓，待挪步至餐厅再聊？
t_en: Ahem, I apologize for interrupting your conversation. The restaurant's private room is ready. If you two have matters to discuss, why not enjoy a brief adjournment and continue later in the restaurant?

t_ch: 有美食相伴，聊起来也开心些。
t_en: Your chat will go much better with good food as an accompaniment.

t_ch: 我不信任这些公司来的人，他们的眼里只有利益。
t_en: I don't trust those IPC people. They only have profit in their eyes.
What a coincidence. Me neither. However...
However what?

t_ch: 如果不接受他们的帮助，我在想…光靠我们家系的力量，真的能重启大典吗？
t_en: If we don't accept their help, I think... can we really restart the festival with just our lineage's influence?

t_ch: 我听那些猎犬说，「按钮」都蔓延到我们「晖长石号」上来了？
t_en: I heard those Hounds say that the "buttons" have even crept onto our Radiant Feldspar?

t_ch: 是有这么回事，不过咱们这儿的按钮数量应该没那么多……
t_en: Is that so? But we shouldn't have that many buttons here...

t_ch: 「应该」？你们还没清查完吗？还有遗漏的「按钮」吗？万一出什么事，那就闹大了呀。
t_en: "Shouldn't"? Are you not done with the checks? Are there still missing "buttons"? It'll be a disaster if something happens.

t_ch: 目前还在搜查中…姐，咱们这儿请的都是家族的贵客，您体谅下，怕得罪人，搜查不易啊！
t_en: The search is still in progress... Madam, everyone here an esteemed guest of The Family — Please cut us some slack. We're having a hard time with the search because we don't want to offend any of them!

t_ch: 很抱歉，您目前的工作排期很紧张，恐怕没有时间再安排一场晚宴了。
t_en: My sincerest apologies. Your current work schedule is packed to the brim. I'm afraid you won't have time to arrange another banquet.

t_ch: 好吧，我就知道…「谐乐大典」为重嘛，我懂。
t_en: Fine. I knew it anyway... The Charmony Festival takes precedence. I get it.

t_ch: 哎…只是我真的搞不懂，先前临时取消，现在口碑破产，再复排又有什么用呢？我们的表演真的能挽回人们对匹诺康尼的信任吗？
t_en: *sigh* ...I just really don't understand. It was canceled at the last minute, to begin with. Now that the event's rep is in shambles, what's the point of even resuming rehearsals? Can our show truly salvage the people's trust in Penacony?

t_ch: 孩子，你先别急…信任的重建需要时间，这得慢慢来。
t_en: Child, you mustn't be anxious... It takes time to rebuild trust. We have to be patient.

t_ch: 艺术是有力量的，我们的光芒会照亮最暗的时刻，就用这次表演证明这一点吧。
t_en: There is power in art. Our radiance will illuminate even the darkest moments, and we shall use this show to prove just that.

t_ch: 你听说了吗？公司派了重量级人物过来，听说是打算把咱们匹诺康尼全收购了。
t_en: Have you heard? The IPC has dispatched some heavyweights here. They apparently intend to fully purchase Penacony.

t_ch: 我们「晖长石号」也在其中…届时，我们的工作会有变动吗？他们该不会上来就裁员吧？
t_en: That includes our Radiant Feldspar... You think our jobs will be affected then? They won't be laying off the lot of us as soon as they take over, will they?

t_ch: 不知道啊，希望不要有太大变动…哎，未来的事，谁说得准呢。
t_en: No idea. I hope there won't be much change... Bah, who knows what the future holds.

t_ch: 我看了下入住记录——这么说来，你们应该都知道了吧，公司的人都到了。
t_en: I checked the check-in log. Which means, you all should already know by now that the IPC's people have all arrived.

t_ch: 我早知道了，我听轮班的同事说，他们还搞了个什么临时的「典当行」，说是什么心愿都能达成，传得神乎其神，我都想下班去看看了。
t_en: I knew that already. My shift coworker told me. They've even established some pop-up Pawnshop, something about being able to grant any wish. All this miracle talk is spreading like wildfire, and even I wanna go take a look when I get off work.

t_ch: 唉，都这个时候了，就别管什么公司不公司了。还是先把我们的本职工作做好。
t_en: *sigh* It's too late to be concerned about whatever the IPC is up to. We should just focus on our jobs first.

t_ch: 谐乐大典的开幕典礼改到咱们这里办了，特殊时期，大家都注意点，别闹出什么笑话了。
t_en: The Charmony Festival's opening ceremony has been reassigned to be held at this place. These are special times, so pay attention and don't make a fool of yourselves.

t_ch: 「晖长石号」的服务水平真是让人失望，连这么点小事你们都办不到，到底是怎么在干活的？
t_en: The Radiant Feldspar's level of service is truly disappointing. You lot can't even accomplish such a trivial matter. How do you even get anything done?

t_ch: 谐乐大典取消又重开，现在改到来这儿办开幕大典，连个指定席都不能帮我预约，那我这贵宾身份到底有什么用？
t_en: The Charmony Festival canceled, then restarted, and now the opening ceremony is reassigned to be held here. Now you can't even help me reserve a specific seat. Is there even a point to my status as a VIP guest?

t_ch: 非常抱歉，夫人…谐乐大典的事超出了我们的职权范围…恐怕……
t_en: I'm truly sorry, madam... The Charmony Festival exceeds our permitted authority... I fear...
Ahem!

t_ch: 夫人，您说得对，是我们服务不周，我们现在已经为您重新预约了，之后的安排请您稍安勿躁，会有专人与您联系。
t_en: Madam, you're right. Our service has been inadequate indeed. We've already rescheduled your reservation. Please do not be worried about the upcoming arrangements, for we will assign someone to get in touch with you.
That's better.

t_ch: …除此以外，「晖长石号」上还有个神秘地点，我听说是最近才出现的。
t_en: ...Also, there's a mystery location on the Radiant Feldspar. I hear that it only appeared recently.
Huh? What mystery location?

t_ch: 我听说有人在船上开了一家临时典当行，那里可以满足你的一切心愿——只要你付得起价。
t_en: I hear someone opened up a pop-up pawnshop on the ship that can grant your every wish — as long as you can pay the price.

t_ch: 听起来不像真的，但在匹诺康尼，这倒合理…我倒是想换取未来的成功——唔，如果真的能达成，一切代价我都可以接受。
t_en: It doesn't sound true, but it ironically does on Penacony... I'd like to trade for some future success... Ooh, if I could really get it, I'd be willing to accept any price.

t_ch: 非常抱歉，尊敬的客人们，谐乐大典的延期给二位带来了不便……
t_en: We're very sorry, esteemed guests, that the Charmony Festival's unexpected delay has inconvenienced the both of you...

t_ch: 仅仅是不便吗？我们回程的星舰票都买好了，害得我们把后面的行程全部改期，你知道这耽误了多少大事吗？
t_en: You think it's a mere inconvenience? We even bought return starship tickets. We've had to change up our entire upcoming schedule because of this mess. Do you know how huge of a disaster this is?

t_ch: 就是啊，轻飘飘一句话就想我们打发了。拜托，道歉要是有用的话，那公司开的保险业务就没有存在的必要了。
t_en: Exactly! And you think you can placate us with just empty words. Please, if apologies worked, the IPC's insurance division wouldn't even have a reason to exist.

t_ch: 请二位放心，家族向两位保证，我们已经解决了所有的安全问题，并且保证不会再有这种情况发生。
t_en: Please do not worry. The Family promises both of you that we have already resolved all safety issues. We guarantee that such circumstances will never occur again.

t_ch: 我们理解意外是无法预测的，但我们是来这里寻求顶级体验的。
t_en: We understand that accidents cannot be anticipated, but we specially came here seeking a world-class experience.

t_ch: 要不是听说知更鸟小姐会登台，哼…但愿大典的表演不会让我们白来一趟。
t_en: If it wasn't for the fact that Miss Robin would be performing, hmph... I hope the festival's performances won't disappoint us.

t_ch: 谐乐大典上有一项新增的流程，届时其他流程都要往后挪。
t_en: The Charmony Festival has a new process in place. The other processes will have to be pushed back then.
Eh? Why wasn't I informed about this?

t_ch: 这是知更鸟小姐亲自嘱托下来的，家主那边也首肯的，你不信可以找人确认下。
t_en: This was Miss Robin's personal instructions, and the family head also approved it first thing. Go confirm it with someone else if you don't believe me.

t_ch: 嗯，这个新增的流程我也有所耳闻，的确是知更鸟小姐的嘱托。
t_en: Yes, I've also heard about this newly added process. It was Miss Robin who passed it down.

t_ch: 这个…我知道了，我待会儿就回去改下开幕流程的草案。之后麻烦二位再确认下。
t_en: I... Understood. I will go back shortly to revise the draft for the opening ceremony process. I would trouble the both of you to re-confirm the rest of the details.
All right. We'll leave it to you then.

t_ch: 谐乐大典遇袭取消，这件事影响巨大…你认为家族会接受并购案的可能性有多大？
t_en: The Charmony Festival's cancellation due to an attack — this matter has grave effects... What do you think are the odds of The Family accepting the acquisition?

t_ch: 很难说，家族的骄傲不会轻易屈服，尽管实际情况可能会迫使他们做出决定。
t_en: Hard to say. The Family's pride will not allow them to easily bend to the acquisition, even if current circumstances force them into a decision.

t_ch: 但仓促之间，把他们逼急了反而会出岔子…所以我觉得，家族未必会接受。
t_en: But in urgent times, something could go wrong if they were riled up... I think The Family may not accept the terms.

t_ch: 那就得看看「战略投资部」的能耐了。
t_en: Then it's up to the prowess of the Strategic Investment Department.
No hurry. We plan ahead before acting.
That's fate. You have to believe in it.
Look at it from there!
Penacony!
It's so beautiful!
The legendary Radiant Feldspar...
Am I dreaming?
Wake up. You're dreaming.
Don't bug me...
This is the Radiant Feldspar!
Be careful of consequences...
Come on, haha...
...I see Robin!
She was so close that I could smell her!
Are you satisfied now?
Don't pour anymore SoulGlad for me!

t_ch: 我是皮皮西，不是未成年！
t_en: I'm a Pepeshi, not a minor!

t_ch: 一会儿我就把合同送过来。
t_en: I'll bring over the contract in a bit.
This way please to wait for the ship...
The Radiant Feldspar has already set off...
Why haven't I made any new friends...
Aren't you going to come over?
Let me admire the scenery a little longer...
The Radiant Feldspar is being renamed?
I'm not still dreaming, am I...

t_ch: 冠名权啊…这也太有面子了！
t_en: Naming rights, wow... Such an honor!
Let's have a chat with The Family as well?
Can you guys use your brains just a little...
Why is the ship changing hands?

t_ch: 听说是送给一位无名客了。
t_en: I heard it was given to a Nameless.

t_ch: 我还以为是什么大富豪呢。
t_en: I thought it would be some magnate.
You know nothing!
The Radiant Feldspar actually changed its name.
I was just being glib...

t_ch: 我不管，这就是命中注定的！
t_en: I don't care. This is definitely destiny!
You got any inside info?
Sounds like there's more than meets the eye...
I doubt we'll be able to hear any of them...
I feel much better...
I'm not as anxious anymore...
Everything will get better...
Did you eat your fill?
My tummy doesn't feel too good...
The Memory Zone's seafood memes are pretty tasty.
You're the first taster...
He should have such a bright future ahead of him...
But he just wants to stay on the ship...
That cook was fired?
No... He's still researching new dishes.
Look at this sky of stars. Magnificent!
...I can't see anything!
Do you have diving services?
Beware of personal trainers...

t_ch: 在忆域死亡能报保险吗？
t_en: Can I buy life insurance for Memory Zone deaths?
You want one?
The kind that takes effect immediately...
Business has been good lately. How about you?
Daily orders are through the roof.
It's safe and steady work to follow the IPC's footsteps.
Look, such a beautiful view...
I... I'm afraid of heights...
Nothing can go wrong...
My big brother has come to Penacony too...
Is it too late for me to run?
Let's have a match.
Therein lies the problem...
Where's the bat?

t_ch: 老古董，这是激光感应的。
t_en: You fossil. These are laser sensors.
...You really don't intend to get in on this business?
I... I really don't have any money.
We are bankrupt!
You win by not playing.
This table is blocking the way...
Are there no Pepeshi-only designs?
I was here first!
No, I was here first!
Sorry, please lower your voices...
Keep your eyes peeled and look very carefully...
Don't panic. We're already looking...
I hear our boss...
Shhh! Someone's coming!
We'll chat online!
That project looks promising...
Could be worth investing in...
I... I'm lost...
I'll help you contact the staff.
This ship's structure is too complex...
Nothing left to do but to wait...
Buck up, everyone!
Got it, boss!
Don't worry, boss!
So unlucky today...
You think YOU'RE down on your luck?
Heh-heh, sorry about that!
How's the return on this month's investment?
Only threefold, that's it!
You need to work on your bragging...
There's really a bug in the hotel room!
Which service do you need?
Ahhhh? What'd you say?
The fee's pretty steep...
I can't lose face!

t_ch: 你们想好拍哪一款了吗？
t_en: You folks decided on which design yet?
You got any inside news?
Shhh, the walls have ears...
I... wasn't eavesdropping!
Is the captain going to keep hiring people?
I don't know. Let's ask when we meet them.
There really are some powerful characters lurking within the IPC...
Your lineage is also brimming with talent...
This quarter's report...
I thought we weren't gonna talk about work?
These golden years...
How wondrous...
We're listening to songs again together...
Please be quiet!
So you're a poet now...
Things aren't what they used to be...
Life isn't perfect...
Give me a few more days to return you the money...
I don't have extra on me...

t_ch: 我就是在这里摔了一跤……
t_en: I slipped and fell right here...
Look at it from there!
Penacony!
It's so beautiful!
The legendary Radiant Feldspar...
Am I dreaming?
Wake up. You're dreaming.
*snore* *snore*...
This is the Radiant Feldspar!
Be careful of consequences...
Come on, haha...
...That's such a pity!
Either way, the Festival is just delayed...
I meant Robin's performance!
Don't pour anymore SoulGlad for me!

t_ch: 我是皮皮西，不是未成年！
t_en: I'm a Pepeshi, not a minor!

t_ch: 我觉得不如一人退一步……
t_en: How about everyone take a step back...
This way please to wait for the ship...
The Radiant Feldspar is about to leave...
I have to make some friends...
Aren't you going to come over?
Let me admire the scenery a little longer...
Why does it feel like I was dreaming before?
I had a nightmare just now...
I really want to buy the ship...
I'll have Daddy build me one.
That old man's so stingy...
I hear there'll be a mystery pawnshop...
I heard about that too...
Why do I not know about this?
Stop being cooped up in your room...
Don't leave me, okay?
Unless the Radiant Feldspar changes its name!
The IPC's top brass are here?
The Charmony Festival actually got delayed...

t_ch: 亏我全套装造都准备好了。
t_en: And I spared no expense for my get-up too.
What's happening on Penacony...
The lady over there is very worried...
Go talk to her...
Why aren't you eating?
Looks like it's not very palatable...
I hear there's a strange cook here...
I'm a little tired of the same dishes...
Really sorry...
The young man plays pretty well.
He's our temp worker.
So many complaints recently!
It's all for that person I'm guessing...
Look at this sky of stars. Magnificent!
...I can't see anything!
Do you have diving services?
Beware of personal trainers...

t_ch: 在忆域死亡能报保险吗？
t_en: Can I buy life insurance for Memory Zone deaths?
You want one?
The kind that takes effect immediately...
Have you made any purchases lately?
Nothing... Business is in a tailspin...
There've been too many unexpected events lately...
Look, such a beautiful view...
I... I'm afraid of heights...
Nothing can go wrong...
My big brother has come to Penacony too...
Is it too late for me to run?
Let's have a match.
Therein lies the problem...
Where's the bat?

t_ch: 老古董，这是激光感应的。
t_en: You fossil. These are laser sensors.
...You really don't intend to get in on this business?
I... I really don't have any money.
I still want to play!
Luck is a fickle mistress...
It's all about the right place and time!
This table is blocking the way...
Are there no Pepeshi-only designs?
I was here first!
No, I was here first!
Sorry, please lower your voices...
Keep your eyes peeled and look very carefully...
Don't panic. We're already looking...
I hear our boss...
Shhh! Someone's coming!
We'll chat online!
That project looks promising...
Could be worth investing in...
I... I'm lost...
I'll help you contact the staff.
This ship's structure is too complex...
Has the exhibit not been delivered yet?
Don't screw this up for me!
Got it, boss!
Don't worry, boss!
So unlucky today...
You think YOU'RE down on your luck?
Heh-heh, sorry about that!
How's the return on this month's investment?
Only threefold, that's it!
You need to work on your bragging...
There's really a bug in the hotel room!
Which service do you need?
Ahhhh? What'd you say?
The fee's pretty steep...
I can't lose face!

t_ch: 你们想好拍哪一款了吗？
t_en: You folks decided on which design yet?
You got any inside news?
Shhh, the walls have ears...
I... wasn't eavesdropping!
Is the captain going to keep hiring people?
I don't know. Let's ask when we meet them.
There really are some powerful characters lurking within the IPC...
Your lineage is also brimming with talent...
This quarter's report...
I thought we weren't gonna talk about work?
These golden years...
How wondrous...
We're listening to songs again together...
Please be quiet!
So you're a poet now...
Things aren't what they used to be...
Life isn't perfect...
Give me a few more days to return you the money...
I don't have extra on me...
The guests from IPC...
...Understood. Please do not worry.
Can you be realistic?

t_ch: 你不懂，这机会千载难得…
t_en: You don't know. This is a golden opportunity...

t_ch: 二位不妨挪步餐厅再聊？
t_en: How about heading to the restaurant to resume your conversation?

t_ch: 复排大典加班这么久…总算结束了。
t_en: The overtime done to reschedule the festival... It's finally over.
What're you peckish for? I'm buying today.
There's a wondrous pawnshop...
Will it really take anything as collateral?
Feels a little scary...
I don't trust IPC's people...
What a coincidence, me neither.
There are still missing "buttons"?
We're still searching for them...
The current schedule is really tight.
*sigh* ...What's the point of all this?
Child, don't be anxious...

t_ch: 公司会不会把我们裁了？
t_en: Will the IPC fire us?
Who knows what the future holds.
Will it really explode?
Shhh!!! Lower your voice.

t_ch: 我听说按下按钮，就会爆炸！
t_en: I've heard that once you hit the button... BOOM!
...Technical issues. We're still working on it.
I made a prior reservation...
I profusely apologize...
I heard the IPC's people have arrived.
The Charmony Festival comes first.

t_ch: …开了个典当行，我还想去看看。
t_en: ...A pawnshop just opened. I want to go take a look.
